channel.title: [Lea Kaftan](https://leakaftan.eu/), Bruno Della Sala, Olga Jerjomina, Stefan Stojkovic, [Edoardo Vigano](https://eavigano.github.io/) and Nils-Christian Bormann | Nils-Christian Bormann
